sections.paragraph:
Original: מעזיהוּ מעזיה

Transliteration: ma‛azyâh ma‛azyâhû

Phonetic: mah-az-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Maaziah = "consolation of Jehovah"
  1. a priest in charge of the 24th course in the time of David
  2. a priest who signed the covenant with Nehemiah

Origin: probably from H5756 (in the sense of protection) and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
